description: 8-probe tool-coverage set for RAG codegen SDK routing. Corpus: thesis_y_refrigeration.txt + baiyao_it_planning.txt (smoke v5 3-doc sub-corpus). Scores tool invocation coverage only — not answer correctness. Graph probes (G1/G2) require INGESTION_TRIPLET_ENABLED=1 re-ingest.

subsets.name: tools_v1
subsets.description: Ordered probes; run sequentially. Labels: tool_summary / tool_metadata / tool_index / tool_graph / tool_section_titles.

examples.query: 请用一段话概括 Y冷冻设备公司论文的核心内容和结论
